channel.title: Comments for page "UIU File: 2017-003"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "UIU File: 2017-003"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: would be more interesting if there was a follow up story (granted that is just me but what ever) +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This sounds like it's going to be quite the detective story. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I…I don’t know how I feel about this one. Don’t get me wrong, the article has been written very well, but it just doesn’t really stand on its own. Which is a shame, because I liked what was happening. The character presented here is interesting, but I ultimately got to the end with more questions than answers, and that feeling of being left hanging wasn’t great.

I gotta stick with a novote, because it’s not bad at all. I just feel that it fails to hold its own without the rest of the team’s stories.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Solid set up for your team's contest entries, and a very effective use of the UIU format.

Additionally, I really enjoy the implications of an alternate universe where the UIU able to fully go after the SCPF.

+1. Well done.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Well formatted, interesting logs, and a lot of spooky foreshadowing. +1 from me :)

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Ditto. It's really refreshing to see an iteration of the UIU that has more power or presence than the Foundation.

I don't think framing it by using 1437 was really necessary (unless it actually has something to do with the events of the article). It seems only to be there to preemptively explain the discrepancies with "standard" headcanon. I would readily accept an alternate-dimension take of a goi-format without needing something like that as a framing device, so it feels extraneous, but it did not detract from the read overall. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This is pretty dope, love the worldbuilding implications for the alt universe.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Ah, my bad. Thank you for the heads up!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I have zero idea what this could be about, but I haven't seen a UIU format in long enough that I'd forgotten what "can" meant, and this was overall a great read.

Why don't we have a giant collaboration hub centered around that hole? c.c

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Had fun reading this and am looking forward to see the next instalment.
One nitpick, though: "Mizrach" isn't a name we have here at all (it means "East"). However, "Mizrachi" is definitely a common last name.

item.title: Author Overview
item.content:encoded:
It's a Beautiful Day In This Neighborhood, isn't it?

Thank you to all of my amazing teammates, Dexanote, Drewbear, and most of all, thedeadlymoose (for staying up until 1 AM with me on this last draft, RIP). Doomcon has been a blast with y'all.

For everyone else, stay tuned for our next updates as they come in. We've got something big planned. Will it be great? Will it be terrible? You'll never know until you see!
